title: Escaping characters in integration message
excerpt: I would like to use Slack integration and post a message to the channel that has “{” characters in it. I don’t know how to escape characters in slack message so that monday does not consider them a monday pulse field. So…

posts.author: mindgutter (Michael Galkovsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to use Slack integration and post a message to the channel that has “{” characters in it. I don’t know how to escape characters in slack message so that monday does not consider them a monday pulse field. So for example, i would like to send the following message to the channel:

{“participant”:{"name:“bob jones”}}

bob jones would come from the pulse, so the way this message would look like in monday integration is as folllows:

{“participant”:{“name:”{pulse.name"}}

But this does not work for obvious reason that monday is thinking that curly brackets represent a monday field. How to escape them so that monday ignores them and treats as characters?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @mindgutter - could you send screenshot or a short video recording showing this behavior to support@monday.com so we can determine wether it is expected behavior or a bug?
